POS checkout queues as a sales invoice only.  Shift open/close and cashbox operations remain online-only.
Opening/closing shifts and cashbox state are not safe to replay blindly.
Restaurant sessions, kitchen state, table moves, and split bills require online branch/server consistency.
Client-side audit events should not disappear when the server is temporarily unreachable.
